gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX (radeonsi, navi31, LLVM 18.1.8, DRM 3.59, 6.12.8-arch1-1)
notes:
The game flickers rapidly and constantly upon launch to an unbearable degree. Even the Steam Overlay flickers. If you fullscreen it at that point, the flickering continues, except your last frame will get frozen as well, taking away your ability to see anything afterwards.
I attempted to disconnect my 2nd monitor following another report, but the game continued flickering even while using just 1 monitor.
If you attempt to quit the game through the settings menu off the main menu, the game goes black and gets stuck. If you attempt to press X on the window, it will ask you to confirm to quit. Clicking "Yes" does nothing, but closing the prompt is what causes the game to quit.
These issues all persist throughout:
* Proton Experimental
* Proton 9.0-4
* Proton 8.0-5
* Proton 7.0-6 (I also got a crash prompt and some weird Wine pop-up while using this)
* GE-Proton 9-20
Runs great without any configuration changes

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6600 (radeonsi, navi23, LLVM 20.1.2, DRM 3.61, 6.14.0-36-generic)
